title: Beta Relived
body:
This Modpack recreates Beta 1.7.3 1:1 but there a foe things you need to do first before jumping in! First change the world type to moderner beta, then customize it to beta 1.7.3, after that go into chunk setting and select deepslate off and in cave chunk settings select it to none istead of voroni. Once all that is done go to datapacks and turn on old world height.

Thats all and take a trip through nostalgia!
